Implement the following plan:

# Consolidate Semantic Releases Views

## Context
There are two places showing a project's semantic releases: a "Semantic Releases" tab inside the project detail page (`project-detail.tsx`) and a standalone page at `/projects/[id]/semantic-releases`. They show the same data with different styling. The standalone page uses generic shadcn components (Card, Badge, Button) which is inconsistent with the flat design system used everywhere else. We need to remove the tab from the project detail page and restyle the standalone page to match.

## Changes

### 1. Remove the "Semantic Releases" tab from the project detail page
**File:** `web/components/projects/project-detail.tsx`
- Remove `"semantic"` from the `tabs` array (line 30)
- Remove the `srApi` import and `srData` SWR fetch (lines 11, 118-121)
- Remove the `UrgencyChip` component and `URGENCY_COLORS` constant (lines 59-78)
- Remove the entire `{activeTab === "semantic" && ...}` block (lines 557-599)

### 2. Restyle the standalone semantic releases list page
**File:** `web/components/semantic-releases/semantic-releases-list.tsx`
- Replace shadcn imports (Card, Badge, Button) with inline styles matching the flat design system
- Use the existing `VersionChip` component from `@/components/ui/version-chip`
- Follow the design patterns from releases list page:
  - Fraunces serif for headings (`fontSize: "24px"`, `fontWeight: 700`, `color: "#111113"`)
  - DM Sans for body text
  - Back link using `ArrowLeft` icon + inline style (color `#6b7280`, fontSize `13px`)
  - Card-style list items with `border: 1px solid #e8e8e5`, `hover:bg-[#fafaf9]`
  - Status displayed as colored text (green `#16a34a` for completed, orange `#e8601a` otherwise)
  - Urgency chips matching the pattern in the current project-detail.tsx
  - Empty state: centered Fraunces italic text
  - Delete button per row (Trash2 icon, red hover)

### 3. Already done: Fix "View all" link
**File:** `web/app/projects/page.tsx` (already fixed)
- "View all" in Semantic Releases section now correctly points to `/projects/${projectId}/semantic-releases`

## Files Modified
- `web/components/projects/project-detail.tsx` — remove semantic tab + related code
- `web/components/semantic-releases/semantic-releases-list.tsx` — full restyle to flat design

## Verification
- Navigate to `/projects` and click "View all" on semantic releases section — should go to `/projects/[id]/semantic-releases`
- The standalone semantic releases page should match the visual style of the releases list page
- Project detail page should no longer have a "Semantic Releases" tab (only Sources, Context Sources, Agent)
- Individual semantic release links should still work: `/projects/[id]/semantic-releases/[srId]`


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/pc/.REDACTED.jsonl

planContent:
# Consolidate Semantic Releases Views

## Context
There are two places showing a project's semantic releases: a "Semantic Releases" tab inside the project detail page (`project-detail.tsx`) and a standalone page at `/projects/[id]/semantic-releases`. They show the same data with different styling. The standalone page uses generic shadcn components (Card, Badge, Button) which is inconsistent with the flat design system used everywhere else. We need to remove the tab from the project detail page and restyle the standalone page to match.

## Changes

### 1. Remove the "Semantic Releases" tab from the project detail page
**File:** `web/components/projects/project-detail.tsx`
- Remove `"semantic"` from the `tabs` array (line 30)
- Remove the `srApi` import and `srData` SWR fetch (lines 11, 118-121)
- Remove the `UrgencyChip` component and `URGENCY_COLORS` constant (lines 59-78)
- Remove the entire `{activeTab === "semantic" && ...}` block (lines 557-599)

### 2. Restyle the standalone semantic releases list page
**File:** `web/components/semantic-releases/semantic-releases-list.tsx`
- Replace shadcn imports (Card, Badge, Button) with inline styles matching the flat design system
- Use the existing `VersionChip` component from `@/components/ui/version-chip`
- Follow the design patterns from releases list page:
  - Fraunces serif for headings (`fontSize: "24px"`, `fontWeight: 700`, `color: "#111113"`)
  - DM Sans for body text
  - Back link using `ArrowLeft` icon + inline style (color `#6b7280`, fontSize `13px`)
  - Card-style list items with `border: 1px solid #e8e8e5`, `hover:bg-[#fafaf9]`
  - Status displayed as colored text (green `#16a34a` for completed, orange `#e8601a` otherwise)
  - Urgency chips matching the pattern in the current project-detail.tsx
  - Empty state: centered Fraunces italic text
  - Delete button per row (Trash2 icon, red hover)

### 3. Already done: Fix "View all" link
**File:** `web/app/projects/page.tsx` (already fixed)
- "View all" in Semantic Releases section now correctly points to `/projects/${projectId}/semantic-releases`

## Files Modified
- `web/components/projects/project-detail.tsx` — remove semantic tab + related code
- `web/components/semantic-releases/semantic-releases-list.tsx` — full restyle to flat design

## Verification
- Navigate to `/projects` and click "View all" on semantic releases section — should go to `/projects/[id]/semantic-releases`
- The standalone semantic releases page should match the visual style of the releases list page
- Project detail page should no longer have a "Semantic Releases" tab (only Sources, Context Sources, Agent)
- Individual semantic release links should still work: `/projects/[id]/semantic-releases/[srId]`

    25→
    26→// RegisterRoutes registers all API v1 routes on the given ServeMux.

    28→	// Public chain: no auth required.

    30→
    31→	// Authenticated chain: includes auth unless NoAuth is set.
    32→	chain := publicChain

    36→
    37→	// Projects (CRUD)

    44→
    45→	// Sources (nested under projects)

    49→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Get)))
    50→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Update)))

    52→
    53→	// Context Sources (nested under projects)

    57→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Get)))
    58→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Update)))
    59→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Delete)))
    60→
    61→	// Releases (read-only, nested under sources and projects)

    63→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.List)))
    64→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListBySource)))

    67→
    68→	// Semantic Releases (nested under projects)

    72→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Delete)))
    73→
    74→	// Subscriptions (CRUD)

    76→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.List)))
    77→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Create)))
    78→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Get)))
    79→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Update)))
    80→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Delete)))
    81→
    82→	// Channels (CRUD)

    84→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.List)))
    85→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Create)))
    86→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Get)))
    87→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Update)))
    88→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Delete)))
    89→
    90→	// Agent
    91→	agent := NewAgentHandler(deps.AgentStore)
    92→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/run", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.TriggerRun)))
    93→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/runs", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.ListRuns)))
    94→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/agent-runs/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.GetRun)))
    95→
    96→	// Providers (metadata — static, no store needed)
    97→	providers := NewProvidersHandler()
    98→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/providers", chain(http.HandlerFunc(providers.List)))
    99→
   100→	// SSE events

   103→

## Summary of Backend Pattern for Listing Releases

I've found and analyzed all the key files. Here's the complete backend pattern:

---

### 1. **Handler Layer** — `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/internal/api/releases.go`

The releases handler defines:
- **Interface `ReleasesStore`** (lines 10-16):
  - `ListAllReleases(ctx, page, perPage)` — returns all releases across all projects
  - `ListReleasesBySource(ctx, sourceID, page, perPage)` — for a specific source
  - `ListReleasesByProject(ctx, projectID, page, perPage)` — for all sources in a project
  - `GetRelease(ctx, id)` — single release

- **Handler `ReleasesHandler`** (lines 18-93):
  - `List()` — GET `/api/v1/releases` → calls `ListAllReleases()`
  - `ListBySource()` — GET `/api/v1/sources/{id}/releases`
  - `ListByProject()` — GET `/api/v1/projects/{projectId}/releases`
  - `Get()` — GET `/api/v1/releases/{id}`

All handlers use `ParsePagination()`, ensure nil slices become empty arrays, and use `RespondList()` for consistent JSON responses.

---

### 2. **Route Registration** — `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/internal/api/server.go` (lines 61-66)

```go
releases := NewReleasesHandler(deps.ReleasesStore)
mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.List)))
mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListBySource)))
mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListByProject)))
mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.Get)))
```

All use the `chain` middleware (auth, rate limiting, etc.) except health endpoints.

---

### 3. **Store Implementation** — `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/internal/api/pgstore.go` (lines 189-279)

The `PgStore` implements `ReleasesStore`:

**`ListAllReleases()` (lines 191-214):**
- Counts total releases: `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM releases`
- Queries with pagination: `ORDER BY COALESCE(released_at, created_at) DESC`
- Returns `[]models.Release` with total count

**`ListReleasesBySource()` (lines 216-239):**
- Filters by `source_id`, counts scoped to source
- Same ordering logic

**`ListReleasesByProject()` (lines 241-267):**
- Joins `releases r` with `sources s` on `r.source_id = s.id`
- Filters by `s.project_id = $1`
- Returns releases across all sources in the project

**`GetRelease()` (lines 269-279):**
- Single-row query by ID

---

### 4. **Semantic Releases Pattern** — `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/internal/api/semantic_releases.go`

**Current state — `SemanticReleasesStore` interface (lines 10-16):**
- `ListSemanticReleases(ctx, projectID, page, perPage)` — **project-scoped only**
- `GetSemanticRelease(ctx, id)`
- `GetSemanticReleaseSources(ctx, id)`
- `DeleteSemanticRelease(ctx, id)`

**Handler** (lines 18-75):
- `List()` — GET `/api/v1/projects/{projectId}/semantic-releases` (project-scoped)
- `Get()` — GET `/api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}`
- `Delete()` — DELETE `/api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}`

**No global `/api/v1/semantic-releases` endpoint exists yet.**

---

### 5. **Ingestion Store** — `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/internal/ingestion/pgstore.go`

This is a separate store used by the ingestion layer (not the API layer):
- Only implements `IngestRelease()` — the transactional outbox pattern
- Inserts release + enqueues `NotifyJobArgs` in one TX
- No listing functions here

---

## Pattern Summary

**For Releases (fully implemented):**
- Global endpoint: `GET /api/v1/releases` → `ListAllReleases()`
- Scoped endpoints: by source and by project
- Pagination: `?page=1&per_page=20` parsed by `ParsePagination()`
- Response: JSON array with total count

**For Semantic Releases (partially implemented):**
- Only project-scoped: `GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/semantic-releases`
- **Missing:** Global `GET /api/v1/semantic-releases` (and its store method `ListAllSemanticReleases()`)
- Would need to add to interface, implement in `pgstore.go`, add handler method, and register route

- Joins `releases r` with `sources s` on `r.source_id = s.id`
- Filters by `s.project_id = $1`
- Returns releases across all sources in the project

**`GetRelease()` (lines 269-279):**
- Single-row query by ID

---

### 4. **Semantic Releases Pattern** — `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/internal/api/semantic_releases.go`

**Current state — `SemanticReleasesStore` interface (lines 10-16):**
- `ListSemanticReleases(ctx, projectID, page, perPage)` — **project-scoped only**
- `GetSemanticRelease(ctx, id)`
- `GetSemanticReleaseSources(ctx, id)`
- `DeleteSemanticRelease(ctx, id)`

**Handler** (lines 18-75):
- `List()` — GET `/api/v1/projects/{projectId}/semantic-releases` (project-scoped)
- `Get()` — GET `/api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}`
- `Delete()` — DELETE `/api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}`

**No global `/api/v1/semantic-releases` endpoint exists yet.**

---

### 5. **Ingestion Store** — `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/internal/ingestion/pgstore.go`

This is a separate store used by the ingestion layer (not the API layer):
- Only implements `IngestRelease()` — the transactional outbox pattern
- Inserts release + enqueues `NotifyJobArgs` in one TX
- No listing functions here

---

## Pattern Summary

**For Releases (fully implemented):**
- Global endpoint: `GET /api/v1/releases` → `ListAllReleases()`
- Scoped endpoints: by source and by project
- Pagination: `?page=1&per_page=20` parsed by `ParsePagination()`
- Response: JSON array with total count

**For Semantic Releases (partially implemented):**
- Only project-scoped: `GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/semantic-releases`
- **Missing:** Global `GET /api/v1/semantic-releases` (and its store method `ListAllSemanticReleases()`)
- Would need to add to interface, implement in `pgstore.go`, add handler method, and register route

package api

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
)

// Dependencies holds all external dependencies required for registering API routes.
type Dependencies struct {
	DB                    *pgxpool.Pool
	ProjectsStore         ProjectsStore
	ReleasesStore         ReleasesStore
	SubscriptionsStore    SubscriptionsStore
	SourcesStore          SourcesStore
	ChannelsStore         ChannelsStore
	ContextSourcesStore   ContextSourcesStore
	SemanticReleasesStore SemanticReleasesStore
	AgentStore            AgentStore
	KeyStore              KeyStore
	HealthChecker         HealthChecker
	Broadcaster           *Broadcaster
	NoAuth                bool
}

// RegisterRoutes registers all API v1 routes on the given ServeMux.
func RegisterRoutes(mux *http.ServeMux, deps Dependencies) {
	// Public chain: no auth required.
	publicChain := Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery)

	// Authenticated chain: includes auth unless NoAuth is set.
	chain := publicChain
	if !deps.NoAuth {
		chain = Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery, RateLimit(10, 20), Auth(deps.KeyStore))
	}

	// Projects (CRUD)
	projects := NewProjectsHandler(deps.ProjectsStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Delete)))

	// Sources (nested under projects)
	sources := NewSourcesHandler(deps.SourcesStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Delete)))

	// Context Sources (nested under projects)
	contextSources := NewContextSourcesHandler(deps.ContextSourcesStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Delete)))

	// Releases (read-only, nested under sources and projects)
	releases := NewReleasesHandler(deps.ReleasesStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.List)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListBySource)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListByProject)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.Get)))

	// Semantic Releases (nested under projects)
	semanticReleases := NewSemanticReleasesHandler(deps.SemanticReleasesStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.List)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Get)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Delete)))

	// Subscriptions (CRUD)
	subscriptions := NewSubscriptionsHandler(deps.SubscriptionsStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Delete)))

	// Channels (CRUD)
	channels := NewChannelsHandler(deps.ChannelsStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Delete)))

	// Agent
	agent := NewAgentHandler(deps.AgentStore)
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/run", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.TriggerRun)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/runs", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.ListRuns)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/agent-runs/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.GetRun)))

	// Providers (metadata — static, no store needed)
	providers := NewProvidersHandler()
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/providers", chain(http.HandlerFunc(providers.List)))

	// SSE events
	events := NewEventsHandler(deps.Broadcaster)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/events", chain(http.HandlerFunc(events.Stream)))

	// Health (public — no auth middleware)
	health := NewHealthHandler(deps.HealthChecker)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/health", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Check)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/stats", chain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Stats)))
}

1→# Consolidate Semantic Releases Views
     2→
     3→## Context

# Consolidate Semantic Releases Views

## Context
There are two places showing a project's semantic releases: a "Semantic Releases" tab inside the project detail page (`project-detail.tsx`) and a standalone page at `/projects/[id]/semantic-releases`. They show the same data with different styling. The standalone page uses generic shadcn components (Card, Badge, Button) which is inconsistent with the flat design system used everywhere else. We need to remove the tab from the project detail page and restyle the standalone page to match.

## Changes

### 1. Remove the "Semantic Releases" tab from the project detail page
**File:** `web/components/projects/project-detail.tsx`
- Remove `"semantic"` from the `tabs` array (line 30)
- Remove the `srApi` import and `srData` SWR fetch (lines 11, 118-121)
- Remove the `UrgencyChip` component and `URGENCY_COLORS` constant (lines 59-78)
- Remove the entire `{activeTab === "semantic" && ...}` block (lines 557-599)

### 2. Restyle the standalone semantic releases list page
**File:** `web/components/semantic-releases/semantic-releases-list.tsx`
- Replace shadcn imports (Card, Badge, Button) with inline styles matching the flat design system
- Use the existing `VersionChip` component from `@/components/ui/version-chip`
- Follow the design patterns from releases list page:
  - Fraunces serif for headings (`fontSize: "24px"`, `fontWeight: 700`, `color: "#111113"`)
  - DM Sans for body text
  - Back link using `ArrowLeft` icon + inline style (color `#6b7280`, fontSize `13px`)
  - Card-style list items with `border: 1px solid #e8e8e5`, `hover:bg-[#fafaf9]`
  - Status displayed as colored text (green `#16a34a` for completed, orange `#e8601a` otherwise)
  - Urgency chips matching the pattern in the current project-detail.tsx
  - Empty state: centered Fraunces italic text
  - Delete button per row (Trash2 icon, red hover)

### 3. Already done: Fix "View all" link
**File:** `web/app/projects/page.tsx` (already fixed)
- "View all" in Semantic Releases section now correctly points to `/projects/${projectId}/semantic-releases`

## Files Modified
- `web/components/projects/project-detail.tsx` — remove semantic tab + related code
- `web/components/semantic-releases/semantic-releases-list.tsx` — full restyle to flat design

## Verification
- Navigate to `/projects` and click "View all" on semantic releases section — should go to `/projects/[id]/semantic-releases`
- The standalone semantic releases page should match the visual style of the releases list page
- Project detail page should no longer have a "Semantic Releases" tab (only Sources, Context Sources, Agent)
- Individual semantic release links should still work: `/projects/[id]/semantic-releases/[srId]`

# Top-level Semantic Releases Page

## Context
The dashboard "View all" link for semantic releases currently points to `/projects/[id]/semantic-releases`, a per-project page. We want a top-level `/semantic-releases` page (like the existing `/releases` page) that shows all semantic releases across projects with a project filter dropdown. The dashboard "View all" links to `/semantic-releases?project={id}`. The semantic release detail page breadcrumb also needs updating to link back to `/semantic-releases`.

## Changes

### 1. Backend: Add `ListAllSemanticReleases` endpoint

**`internal/api/semantic_releases.go`** — Add `ListAllSemanticReleases` to the store interface and a `ListAll` handler method
- Add `ListAllSemanticReleases(ctx, page, perPage) ([]models.SemanticRelease, int, error)` to `SemanticReleasesStore` interface
- Add `ListAll` handler: `GET /api/v1/semantic-releases` → calls `ListAllSemanticReleases()`
- Pattern: copy from `releases.go` `List` handler

**`internal/api/pgstore.go`** — Implement `ListAllSemanticReleases`
- `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM semantic_releases` for total
- `SELECT ... FROM semantic_releases ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $1 OFFSET $2`
- Pattern: copy from existing `ListSemanticReleases`, remove `WHERE project_id = $1`

**`internal/api/server.go`** — Register the new route
- Add `mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListAll)))` before the `{id}` routes

**`internal/api/semantic_releases_test.go`** — Update mock + add test
- Add `ListAllSemanticReleases` to `mockSemanticReleasesStore`
- Register `GET /semantic-releases` in `setupSemanticReleasesMux`
- Add `TestSemanticReleasesHandlerListAll` test

### 2. Frontend API client: Add `listAll`

**`web/lib/api/client.ts`** — Add to `semanticReleases` object:
```ts
listAll: (page = 1, perPage = 25) =>
  request<ApiResponse<SemanticRelease[]>>(`/semantic-releases?page=${page}&per_page=${perPage}`),
```

### 3. New top-level `/semantic-releases` page (mirrors `/releases`)

**`web/app/semantic-releases/page.tsx`** — New route page (thin wrapper)

**`web/components/semantic-releases/semantic-releases-list.tsx`** — Rewrite to match releases page pattern:
- Accept optional `initialProject` from `?project=` query param (via `useSearchParams`)
- Project filter dropdown (fetch all projects, "All Projects" default)
- Two SWR calls: `srApi.listAll()` for all, `srApi.list(projectId)` for filtered
- Table or card rows with: project name, version (VersionChip), status (colored text), urgency chip, age, delete button
- Pagination (Previous/Next, N–M of total)
- Empty state: centered Fraunces italic
- No back link (it's a top-level page now)

### 4. Update dashboard "View all" link

**`web/app/projects/page.tsx`** — Change link:
- From: `/projects/${projectId}/semantic-releases`
- To: `/semantic-releases?project=${projectId}`

### 5. Update semantic release detail page breadcrumb

**`web/components/semantic-releases/semantic-release-detail.tsx`** — Update breadcrumb and delete redirect:
- "Semantic Releases" breadcrumb link: `/semantic-releases?project=${projectId}` (instead of `/projects/${projectId}/semantic-releases`)
- `handleDelete` redirect: `/semantic-releases?project=${projectId}` (instead of `/projects/${projectId}/semantic-releases`)

### 6. Add sidebar nav entry

**`web/components/layout/sidebar.tsx`** — Add nav item:
- `{ href: "/semantic-releases", label: "Reports", icon: Brain }` after Releases
- Import `Brain` from lucide-react

### 7. Remove old per-project route (optional cleanup)

**`web/app/projects/[id]/semantic-releases/page.tsx`** — Delete or redirect to `/semantic-releases?project={id}`
- Keep the detail route `web/app/projects/[id]/semantic-releases/[srId]/page.tsx` since it's linked from agent runs and other places; update to also support `/semantic-releases/[srId]` if needed — actually the GET endpoint is already `/semantic-releases/{id}`, so detail links can stay at the old paths for now

## Files Modified
1. `internal/api/semantic_releases.go` — interface + ListAll handler
2. `internal/api/pgstore.go` — ListAllSemanticReleases implementation
3. `internal/api/server.go` — register GET /api/v1/semantic-releases
4. `internal/api/semantic_releases_test.go` — mock + test for ListAll
5. `web/lib/api/client.ts` — add `listAll` method
6. `web/app/semantic-releases/page.tsx` — new route page
7. `web/components/semantic-releases/semantic-releases-list.tsx` — full rewrite
8. `web/app/projects/page.tsx` — update "View all" link
9. `web/components/semantic-releases/semantic-release-detail.tsx` — update breadcrumb + delete redirect
10. `web/components/layout/sidebar.tsx` — add nav entry

## Verification
- `go test ./internal/api/...` — all tests pass including new ListAll test
- `npx tsc --noEmit` — no type errors
- Dashboard "View all" → `/semantic-releases?project=...` → shows filtered list
- Filter dropdown → "All Projects" shows everything, specific project filters correctly
- Pagination works
- Delete button works with confirmation dialog
- Click a row → detail page, breadcrumb links back to `/semantic-releases?project=...`
- Sidebar shows "Reports" entry, active state highlights correctly
